featureSections.title: Restore Your Driveway to Like-New Condition
featureSections.body: Oil stains, tire marks, and grime don’t stand a chance. Our hot water pressure washing removes deep-set dirt and stains, leaving your concrete clean and bright.
bullets: Removes oil, grease, and rust stains
No harsh chemicals – safe for landscaping
Increases property value and curb appeal
featureSections.cardBody: See the dramatic difference a professional power wash can make on your driveway or walkway.

featureSections.title: Gentle Yet Effective Siding Cleaning
featureSections.body: From vinyl to brick, we safely remove algae, mildew, and dirt without damaging your siding. Our soft wash technique preserves your home’s exterior while making it shine.
bullets: Soft wash method protects paint and surfaces
Eliminates black streaks and mold growth
featureSections.cardBody: Our most popular service – a complete exterior clean that transforms your home’s appearance.

servicesPage.intro: DFW Power Wash provides comprehensive pressure washing services for residential and commercial properties in Dallas, TX. From driveways to roofs, we use industry-leading equipment and eco-friendly solutions to deliver a deep, lasting clean. Explore our services below.

services.title: Driveway & Concrete Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Remove tough stains and grime from driveways, walkways, and patios.
services.longDescription: Our hot water pressure washing system blasts away oil, grease, and embedded dirt, restoring your concrete to its original color. We treat all surfaces gently to avoid damage, leaving a clean, even finish.
benefits: Eliminates oil stains and tire marks
Enhances curb appeal and property value

process.title: Inspection & Pre-Treatment
process.description: We assess the surface and apply an eco-friendly degreaser to break down stubborn stains.

process.title: Hot Water Power Wash
process.description: Using high-pressure hot water, we thoroughly clean the concrete, reaching deep into pores.

process.title: Final Rinse & Seal (Optional)
process.description: We rinse away all residue and can apply a protective sealant to extend the life of your clean.

faqs.question: Will pressure washing damage my driveway?
faqs.answer: No, when done correctly. Our technicians use the proper pressure and technique to clean without etching or cracking. We adjust settings based on concrete condition.

faqs.question: How often should I have my driveway cleaned?
faqs.answer: We recommend every 1-2 years to prevent stain buildup and maintain appearance. High-traffic areas may benefit from annual cleaning.

services.title: House & Siding Washing
services.shortDescription: Gentle soft wash cleaning for vinyl, brick, stucco, and more.
services.longDescription: Our soft wash method uses low pressure and specialized detergents to safely remove algae, mildew, and dirt from your home’s exterior. This technique protects paint, siding, and seals while delivering a brilliant clean.
benefits: Removes black streaks and organic growth
Prevents long-term damage from mold and mildew

process.title: Surface Evaluation
process.description: We inspect your siding for damage and choose the right cleaning solution for the material.

process.title: Soft Wash Application
process.description: We apply a biodegradable cleaner that kills mold and lifts dirt, then rinse gently.

process.title: Spot Treatment & Final Check
process.description: We treat any remaining spots and ensure even coverage, leaving your home spotless.

faqs.question: Is soft washing safe for my plants?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use plant-safe detergents and rinse thoroughly. We also wet down nearby vegetation before and after to prevent any stress.

faqs.question: How long does a house wash take?
faqs.answer: Most single-story homes take 1-2 hours. Two-story homes may take 2-3 hours depending on size and condition.

services.title: Roof Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Remove moss, algae, and lichen without damaging shingles.
services.longDescription: Our roof cleaning service uses a low-pressure soft wash to safely eliminate organic growth that can deteriorate shingles. We treat asphalt, tile, and metal roofs, extending their lifespan and improving energy efficiency.
benefits: Extends roof life by preventing decay
Improves energy efficiency by reflecting heat
Enhances home appearance from the curb

process.title: Roof Inspection
process.description: We check for loose shingles or damage and plan the safest cleaning route.

process.title: Soft Wash Treatment
process.description: We apply a gentle cleaning solution that kills moss and algae without abrasive scrubbing.

process.title: Low-Pressure Rinse
process.description: We rinse with low pressure to avoid lifting shingles, leaving a clean, uniform surface.

faqs.question: Will roof cleaning void my warranty?
faqs.answer: No, our soft wash method is safe and recommended by most shingle manufacturers. We follow industry best practices.

faqs.question: How often should I clean my roof?
faqs.answer: Every 2-3 years is typical, but homes in shaded or humid areas may need more frequent cleaning to prevent moss buildup.

services.title: Commercial Pressure Washing
services.shortDescription: Keep your business looking professional with regular cleaning.
services.longDescription: We offer commercial pressure washing for storefronts, parking lots, sidewalks, and fleet vehicles. Our team works around your schedule to minimize disruption, delivering a clean that impresses customers and tenants.
benefits: Enhances business image and foot traffic
Flexible scheduling – after hours or weekends

process.title: Site Assessment
process.description: We evaluate the area and identify high-traffic zones, stains, and safety hazards.

process.title: Targeted Cleaning
process.description: Using hot water and appropriate detergents, we clean surfaces efficiently, focusing on problem areas.

process.title: Post-Clean Walkthrough
process.description: We review the results with you and ensure the property is safe and ready for use.

faqs.question: Do you offer recurring service contracts?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide monthly, quarterly, or annual plans to keep your property consistently clean. Ask about discounts for regular service.

faqs.question: Is your commercial cleaning eco-friendly?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use biodegradable cleaners and recycle water when possible to minimize environmental impact.

about.headline: Dallas’s Trusted Pressure Washing Experts
about.mission: Our mission is to deliver exceptional pressure washing services that restore and protect properties while providing outstanding customer experiences.
story: DFW Power Wash was founded on the belief that every property deserves to look its best. Starting with a single truck and a commitment to quality, we’ve grown into a trusted name in Dallas pressure washing. Our founder, a lifelong Dallas resident, saw the need for reliable, eco-friendly cleaning that didn’t cut corners. Today, we serve hundreds of homeowners and businesses with the same dedication to detail.

We invest in the latest equipment and training to ensure every job is done safely and effectively. Our team is fully insured, and we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. From residential driveways to commercial storefronts, we treat each property as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Quality Workmanship
coreValues.description: We never rush a job. Every surface is cleaned with precision and care to deliver lasting results.

coreValues.title: Customer Respect
coreValues.description: We communicate clearly, arrive on time, and leave your property better than we found it.

coreValues.title: Environmental Stewardship
coreValues.description: We use biodegradable products and water-saving techniques to protect Dallas’s natural resources.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We stay updated on industry best practices and invest in new technology to serve you better.

contact.headline: Get Your Free Estimate Today
contact.subheadline: Ready to transform your property? Call or fill out the form below and we’ll respond within 24 hours.
